mapper.update:
update mt_commission_log set STATUS = 'B',OPERATOR = #{operator} where SETTLE_UUID = #{uuid}
AND MERCHANT_ID = #{merchantId}

update mt_commission_log set STATUS = 'A',OPERATOR = #{operator} where SETTLE_UUID = #{uuid}
AND MERCHANT_ID = #{merchantId}
mapper.select: SELECT IFNULL(SUM(AMOUNT), 0) FROM mt_commission_log WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} AND STATUS IN ('A', 'B')
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT ORDER_ID) FROM mt_commission_log WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} AND STATUS = 'A'
